AccessoryService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid
AccessoryService provides interfaces for handling accessories on a device.
AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid
AbstractAccessoryObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the AccessoryService operations.
AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryStartObserver - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid
AbstractAccessoryStartObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the ready state of the AccessoryService operations.

AccessService provides interfaces for getting user information from a printer.

ApproximatePagesRemaining - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"
ApproximatePagesRemaining.ApproximatePagesRemainingSymbol - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"

AuthenticationAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
Provides the authentication attributes to be filled with user details for requesting sign in.
AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T extends AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationAttributesBuilder<T>> - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
Base builder of AuthenticationAttributes which contain mandatory parameters for building authentication information.
AuthenticationAttributes.AuthenticationType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.access
A collection of authentication attributes type.
AuthenticationAttributes.LdapBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of LDAP type to request sign in.
AuthenticationAttributes.NovellBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of Novell Directory Service type to request sign in.
AuthenticationAttributes.OtherBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of Other type to request sign in.
AuthenticationAttributes.PinBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of Pin type to request sign in.
AuthenticationAttributes.WindowsBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of Windows type to request sign in.
AuthenticationAttributes.WindowsSmartCardBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
The Builder for creating AuthenticationAttributes of Windows Smart Card type to request sign in.

authenticationType - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthenticatedUserInfo
 
AuthenticationType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The AuthenticationType enum represents various types of authentication methods supported by the system.
AuthorizationService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The AuthorizationService class provides methods to interact with the SDK.
authorizeUser(UserAuthorizationData) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AbstractAuthorizationService
Called to notify when user sign-in that authorization service request user authorization data for grant/denies.
